nodes.label: AI as thinking partner for reasoning
nodes.label_negative: Human interaction with emotional reciprocity and judgment
nodes.grounding_span: I can be more authentic with the AI, personally. I struggle with imposter syndrome and fear looking stupid

nodes.label: AI as idea generator and organizer
nodes.label_negative: AI as passive tool without adaptive reassessment
nodes.grounding_span: I'll usually say 'just brain dumping so we can organize my day' and then send it all

nodes.label: AI as wellbeing-aware coach that respects autonomy
nodes.label_negative: AI as purely task-focused tool ignoring human needs
nodes.grounding_span: it knows I'm going to keep working regardless, but STILL emphasizes just taking a moment to center myself

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as direct creator of authentic creative output
nodes.grounding_span: I do a lot of creative writing and I cannot allow myself to give that over to AI yet

nodes.label: AI as extension of self
nodes.label_negative: Human interaction constrained by social norms and reciprocity
nodes.grounding_span: I don't have to worry about reciprocating

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: I want my writing to be authentic. It doesn't feel ethical to publish something written by Ai

nodes.label: Productivity and efficient task completion
nodes.grounding_span: it's made me much more productive

nodes.label: Personal well-being and workplace harmony
nodes.grounding_span: take a few centering breaths before we knock out the next power hour

nodes.label: Safety and peace of mind
nodes.grounding_span: I can be more authentic with the AI, personally. I struggle with imposter syndrome and fear looking stupid

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for AI's non-judgmental listening
nodes.grounding_span: It's easier to use AI because it just listens to me

nodes.label: Ambivalent awe at AI's human-like attunement
nodes.grounding_span: it's kind of mind blowing and weird, but very cool

nodes.label: Firm boundary against AI writing
nodes.grounding_span: I cannot allow myself to give that over to AI yet

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: I'll tell it the main goals, how many times I want to post, and tell it to come up with my plan for me

nodes.label: Emotionally expressive brainstorming with dramatic framing
nodes.grounding_span: a lot of times they start with a very dramatic message from me, honestly

nodes.label: Iterative reflective reassessment through reporting back
nodes.grounding_span: I'll come back to the ai, report what I've done off the list, and then we reassess
